pr.title: chore: move who-is-an-illusion images to Bunny CDN
pr.body:
## Summary

Moves all 10 blog post images and the OG image for "Who Is an Illusion" from local `public/images/` to Bunny CDN (`zackproser.b-cdn.net`).

Changes:
- Updated all `<Image src=...>` references in `page.mdx` to use CDN URLs
- Updated `metadata.json` hero image to CDN URL
- Removed 10 local `.webp` files from `public/images/`
- Generated and uploaded OG image to `images/og-images/who-is-an-illusion.png` on CDN

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Verify images load on the deployed preview at `/blog/who-is-an-illusion`
- [ ] Confirm OG image renders correctly when sharing the post URL (check `https://zackproser.b-cdn.net/images/og-images/who-is-an-illusion.png`)

### Notes

All images verified accessible on CDN (HTTP 200) before this PR was created. Local build passes.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/0490346cc8b44dde92f1ac500b0a483f
Requested by: @zackproser
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
